law.catch_line: Prohibition against reckless endangerment of others by throwing objects from places higher than one story; penalty

text.section: It shall be unlawful for any person, with the intent to cause injury to another, to intentionally throw from a balcony, roof top, or other place more than one story above ground level any object capable of causing any such injury.
A violation of this section shall be punishable as a Class 6 felony.
